content:
type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature (path_transform) touches every loader class (BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader) so we can't get a disjoint file split - we both must edit loaders.py. To minimize collision in FileSystemLoader specifically: I'll add path_transform as the LAST keyword-only param in each __init__ signature (after any params you add like fallback_searchpath), and apply the transform as the very FIRST statement inside get_source/get_source-equivalent methods, before any existing lookup logic (including fallback_searchpath). I won't touch fallback_searchpath logic. Please add your fallback_searchpath param/logic without regard to path_transform - I'll layer around it. OK to both proceed independently on this basis?
